instruction:
The voltage V across a charged capacitor is given by $V(t)=6 e^{-0.5 t}$ where t is in seconds.
(a) What is the voltage after 4 seconds? [ANS] volts (round to the nearest 0.001 volts)
(b) When will the voltage be 1? In [ANS] seconds (round to the nearest 0.01 sec.)
(c) By what percent does the voltage decrease each second? [ANS] \% (round to the nearest 0.001\%)
